/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libhelmholtz_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libhelmholtz_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/helmholtz_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/helmholtz_interfaces/msg/detail/command__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/helmholtz_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/helmholtz_interfaces/srv/detail/set_pid__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
